item.title: Affordable Skies: Finding a Budget Twin-Engine Plane
item.description: Twin‑engine aircraft don’t always mean sky‑high prices. Which models deliver reliability at a budget‑friendly cost, and what trade‑offs come with flying them?

media:content.media:title: Affordable Skies: Finding a Budget Twin-Engine Plane
media:content.media:description: Twin‑engine aircraft don’t always mean sky‑high prices. Which models deliver reliability at a budget‑friendly cost, and what trade‑offs come with flying them?

item.title: Big Bertha Returns After 24 Years
item.description: After decades away, Big Bertha makes a powerful comeback. What story lies behind this long‑awaited return?

item.title: Exploring the Mig-23’s Capabilities
item.description: From speed to maneuverability, the Mig‑23 shows off its Cold War design. What strengths and surprises define this fighter jet?

item.title: First Flight of the Cheapest 421C
item.description: After years of waiting, the cheapest Cessna 421C finally takes to the skies. What challenges and surprises unfold during its first flight?
